package rulefixtures

// scenario for wide_select_query: Literal SELECT * query shapes.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule694NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario694Negative(records []Rule694NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
